subject: docs(pwa): add cache headers, ChunkLoadError prevention, and platform gotchas to PWA guide
body:
Research into vite-plugin-pwa best practices revealed gaps in both the Vite config
and the suggested implementation doc. Added cleanupOutdatedCaches and globPatterns
to the Workbox config, and expanded PWA_SYSTEM.md with cache header guidance,
ChunkLoadError prevention patterns, Safari/Expo gotchas, and navigateFallback
SPA-only warnings.

Tags: pwa, documentation, caching, workbox
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-system
Semver: patch
